data.title: Fix: recipe-engine-adapter contract missing RECIPE_MIN_ENGINE_VERSION unset behavior
data.description: The contract does not specify adapter behavior when RECIPE_MIN_ENGINE_VERSION is absent or empty. The Version Check Protocol says the adapter MUST validate against this value, but an unset variable creates ambiguity: skip the check, treat as '0.0.0', or emit degraded. A defensive default should be documented (e.g., 'if RECIPE_MIN_ENGINE_VERSION is unset or empty, the adapter MUST skip version checking and proceed'). File: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/recipe-engine-adapter.md
